## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Saskia to convert Metronome content to JSON.](https://fathom.video/share/Ws9-h5LTgSwsEFjkzY43ReEcEQFi1tR7?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Task:** Convert 9 finalized Metronome Google Docs (AI Pricing Index) to JSON using Claude.](https://fathom.video/share/Ws9-h5LTgSwsEFjkzY43ReEcEQFi1tR7?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [**Workflow:** Use a sample JSON and a specific prompt to generate files, then upload to Airtable and a shared Drive folder.](https://fathom.video/share/Ws9-h5LTgSwsEFjkzY43ReEcEQFi1tR7?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [**Timeline:** Deliver 3–5 files today (Dec 15); the rest by Wednesday (Dec 17) to accommodate Saskia's holiday.](https://fathom.video/share/Ws9-h5LTgSwsEFjkzY43ReEcEQFi1tR7?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [**Documentation:** Create a Loom walkthrough of the process to train team members like Felix.](https://fathom.video/share/Ws9-h5LTgSwsEFjkzY43ReEcEQFi1tR7?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)

## Topics

### Metronome JSON Conversion Task

  - [**Goal:** Convert 9 finalized Google Docs for Metronome's AI Pricing Index into JSON for publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/Ws9-h5LTgSwsEFjkzY43ReEcEQFi1tR7?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [**Source Files:** Use the most recent, finalized versions, identified by the `12/25-full` suffix.](https://fathom.video/share/Ws9-h5LTgSwsEFjkzY43ReEcEQFi1tR7?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ws9-h5LTgSwsEFjkzY43ReEcEQFi1tR7?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
    1.  [**Backup:** Move existing JSON files from Airtable to the `Internal content drafts` Drive folder to prevent data loss.](https://fathom.video/share/Ws9-h5LTgSwsEFjkzY43ReEcEQFi1tR7?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
    2.  [**Generate:** Use Claude with a sample JSON and a specific prompt to convert the Google Doc.](https://fathom.video/share/Ws9-h5LTgSwsEFjkzY43ReEcEQFi1tR7?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
    3.  [**Upload:** Attach the new JSON file to the corresponding Airtable record.](https://fathom.video/share/Ws9-h5LTgSwsEFjkzY43ReEcEQFi1tR7?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
    4.  [**Share:** Place a copy in the `PSOA, pricing index... final JSON files` Drive folder for client access.](https://fathom.video/share/Ws9-h5LTgSwsEFjkzY43ReEcEQFi1tR7?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)

### Timeline & Deliverables

  - [**Today (Dec 15):** Deliver 3–5 JSON files.](https://fathom.video/share/Ws9-h5LTgSwsEFjkzY43ReEcEQFi1tR7?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [**Wednesday (Dec 17):** Deliver the remaining files.](https://fathom.video/share/Ws9-h5LTgSwsEFjkzY43ReEcEQFi1tR7?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This schedule accommodates Saskia's holiday on Tuesday (Dec 16).](https://fathom.video/share/Ws9-h5LTgSwsEFjkzY43ReEcEQFi1tR7?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [**Contingency:** Saskia is available for additional tasks this week, including a potential "lovable article" for Metronome.](https://fathom.video/share/Ws9-h5LTgSwsEFjkzY43ReEcEQFi1tR7?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ws9-h5LTgSwsEFjkzY43ReEcEQFi1tR7?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
      - [Provide a sample JSON file for the Claude prompt.](https://fathom.video/share/Ws9-h5LTgSwsEFjkzY43ReEcEQFi1tR7?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
      - [Share links to all relevant resources (Airtable, Drive, Claude call).](https://fathom.video/share/Ws9-h5LTgSwsEFjkzY43ReEcEQFi1tR7?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
  - [**Saskia:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ws9-h5LTgSwsEFjkzY43ReEcEQFi1tR7?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
      - [Convert 3–5 Metronome docs to JSON today.](https://fathom.video/share/Ws9-h5LTgSwsEFjkzY43ReEcEQFi1tR7?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
      - [Deliver remaining files by Wednesday.](https://fathom.video/share/Ws9-h5LTgSwsEFjkzY43ReEcEQFi1tR7?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
      - [Create a Loom walkthrough of the process if it becomes efficient.](https://fathom.video/share/Ws9-h5LTgSwsEFjkzY43ReEcEQFi1tR7?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
